nasb.text: But the Lord is with me like a dread champion; Therefore my persecutors will stumble and not prevail. They will be utterly ashamed, because they have failed, With an everlasting disgrace that will not be forgotten.

esv.text: But the Lord is with me as a dread warrior; therefore my persecutors will stumble; they will not overcome me. They will be greatly shamed, for they will not succeed. Their eternal dishonor will never be forgotten.

cnv.text: 但耶和華與我同在，像一個威武可畏的勇士， 因此，逼迫我的都必跌倒，不能得勝。 他們必大大蒙羞，因為他們失敗了； 這永遠的恥辱是人不能忘記的。

ccb.text: 但耶和华与我同在， 祂像勇猛的战士。 迫害我的人必一败涂地， 羞愧难当，留下永远的耻辱。
